mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Rebecca Duncan, Until she married Cox 03.25.1902 and became 21 years of age by 10.31.1903
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Rebecca Duncan, Until she married Cox 03.25.1902 and became 21 years of age by 10.31.1903 Beaufort Duncan, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book Book 5, Page 270, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
